      Remove instruments and background sounds from any audio or song, leaving just the vocal track.

AI audio tools

AI Stem Splitter

Split any song into separate tracks — vocals, drums, bass, and other instruments — using our free online stem splitter.

Try now
AI Vocal Remover

Use our free online tool to remove vocals and isolate instrumentals from any music track in seconds.

Try now
Voice Extractor

Easily extract vocals and remove instruments from any audio file or song. 100% free and online.

Try now
Audio Converter

Convert and process your music files online for free. Supports all popular formats including MP3, and works instantly with no installation required.

Try now
Speech to text

Accurate Audio Transcription Online powered by AI — convert speech to text and save time on your music, podcasts, and audio projects.

Try now

Effects and Plugins

Samplab

Seamlessly converts audio to MIDI

A powerful audio-to-MIDI technology lets you fine-tune every note, harmony, and rhythm with precision, unlocking a new level of flexibility for producers, songwriters, and remix artists.

Overtune Arrange

Arrange professional-grade instrumentals using curated studio-quality loops

The all-in-one beat creation platform for singers, rappers, and songwriters who want full creative freedom without complex tools.

Podcast Effects & Music

Set the mood for any story with the Podcast Effects & Music Pack

Blending R&B, country, funk, electronica, Latin, dance, and more, this versatile collection offers loops, beats, and themes to match any tone. This pack provides a full spectrum of audio elements to enhance your podcast production.

96% OFF !

Creator Music & SFX Bundle

Making videos, streaming, podcasting, or building the next viral clip?

The Content Creator Music & SFX Bundle delivers 70 packs of hard-hitting tracks and sound effects to give your projects the fresh, pro edge they deserve.
